# AI Agents for Everyone
> The most comprehensive guide for OpenAI Codex — teaching the agentic paradigm to everyone, including people who are new to AI.

Codex is an AI agent that can DO things — edit files, write code, run commands, fix bugs — not just answer questions. This guide helps anyone learn to use it effectively and safely.

## Core Resources
- [Main Guide](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/ultimate-guide.md): Complete documentation covering 15 sections from installation to advanced patterns
- [Cheat Sheet](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/cheatsheet.md): Printable one-page quick reference
- [Reference Index](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/machine-readable/reference.yaml): Machine-readable YAML navigation index for all topics

## Architecture & Concepts
- [Architecture](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/core/architecture.md): How the agentic loop works (read, plan, act, verify)
- [Glossary](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/core/glossary.md): Plain-language definitions of all terms
- [Settings Reference](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/core/settings-reference.md): Complete settings documentation
- [Methodologies](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/core/methodologies.md): Proven approaches for working with Codex

## Security
- [Security Hardening](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/security/security-hardening.md): How to keep your setup safe
- [Sandbox Modes](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/security/sandbox-modes.md): Read-only, workspace-write, and full-access explained
- [Data Privacy](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/security/data-privacy.md): How your data is handled
- [Enterprise Governance](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/security/enterprise-governance.md): Organization-wide policies and controls

## Workflows
- [Bug Fixing](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/workflows/bug-fixing-workflow.md): Step-by-step bug fix workflow
- [Feature Development](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/workflows/feature-development-workflow.md): Building new features with Codex
- [Exploration](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/guide/workflows/exploration-workflow.md): Learning and exploring a codebase

## Interactive Tools
- [Onboarding Prompt](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/tools/onboarding-prompt.md): Personalized guided tour (adaptive, 5-120 min)
- [Setup Audit](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/tools/audit-prompt.md): Check your Codex configuration
- [Context Audit](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/tools/context-audit-prompt.md): Optimize how you use context

## Audience-Specific Guides
- [For CTOs](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/docs/for-cto.md): Adoption strategy, risks, security, cost
- [For Tech Leads](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/docs/for-tech-leads.md): Team setup, review process, training
- [For Product Managers](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/docs/for-product-managers.md): Velocity impact, planning, stakeholder communication
- [For Beginners](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/docs/for-beginners.md): Complete beginner FAQ — what is AI, what is an agent, is it safe

## Examples
- [Agent Templates](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/examples/agents/): Ready-to-use agent definitions
- [Custom Commands](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/examples/commands/): Custom slash command examples
- [Hook Scripts](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/examples/hooks/): Automation hook examples
- [Config Files](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/examples/configs/): Configuration templates
- [Skills](https://github.com/paulhshort/ai-agents-for-everyone/blob/main/examples/skills/): Custom skill examples

## MCP Server
- Install: `npx -y ai-agents-for-everyone-mcp`
- Tools: search_guide, read_section, get_cheatsheet, get_commands, get_golden_rules, troubleshoot, get_glossary_term
- Query the guide from any MCP-compatible AI assistant without cloning the repo

## Key Facts
- Product: OpenAI Codex (CLI + App + Web)
- Models: GPT-5.4 (default), GPT-5.4-mini (fast), GPT-5.3-codex (legacy)
- Install: `npm install -g @openai/codex` or `brew install --cask codex`
- Config: TOML format at ~/.codex/config.toml (user), .codex/config.toml (project)
- Project instructions: AGENTS.md at project root
- Included with: ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Business, Team, Edu, Enterprise
- Sandbox modes: read-only, workspace-write, danger-full-access
- Approval modes: untrusted, on-request, never, --full-auto, --yolo
- Version: 0.2.0
